title: User Facts
description: Persistent facts about a user. Each fact is a simple, neutral memory entry.

user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user. Match the parent directory name.

facts.description: Ordered list of durable facts about the user.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for the fact.

statement.description: Natural language statement of the fact.

confidence.description: How confident the system is in this fact, 0-1.

source.description: Where this fact originated, e.g. session bc7429c1.

expires_at.description: Optional expiry. Omit for durable facts.

created_at.description: When the fact was first recorded.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to this facts list.
